key.name: window-width
key.description: The width of the main application window.

key.name: window-height
key.description: The height of the main application window.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window is maximized.

key.name: default-model
key.description: The default AI model to use for new conversations.

key.name: system-message
key.description: Custom system message prepended to all conversations.

key.name: cli-path
key.description: Override path to the Copilot CLI binary. Leave empty to use $PATH.

key.name: log-level
key.description: Application log level (debug, info, warning, error).
